/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -g -fno-rtti -fno-exceptions -ffp-contract=on -faligned-allocation -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -pthread CMakeFiles/JoltViewer.dir/Users/eimantas/Repositories/JoltPhysics/JoltViewer/JoltViewer.cpp.o -o JoltViewer.app/Contents/MacOS/JoltViewer  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -Wl,-rpath,INSTALL_RPATH libTestFramework.a libJolt.a -framework Foundation -framework Metal -framework MetalKit -framework Cocoa -framework GameController
